description_long: This object is a classic hot dog, featuring a plump, reddish-brown sausage nestled within a soft, lightly browned bun. The bun is split lengthwise, cradling the sausage securely, with both ends of the sausage protruding slightly beyond the bun. The surface of the bun appears smooth and slightly matte, while the sausage has a subtle sheen, indicating a moist, cooked texture. There are no visible condiments or toppings, and the hot dog is unwrapped, ready to eat. The overall appearance is appetizing and typical of street food found in urban parks, food stands, or city events.
description: A classic hot dog with a reddish-brown sausage in a soft, split bun, unadorned and unwrapped.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the sausage centered in the bun, with both ends of the sausage visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the hot dog, with the sausage and bun aligned horizontally.
description_view_2: Another top-down view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the sausage nestled in the bun.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite side, again showing the sausage and bun in profile.
